text:
*[Bug 16750] Treat character as factor in summary.default*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=16750>

Sebastian Meyer (<mailto:seb.meyer@fau.de|seb.meyer@fau.de>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
             Status|CONFIRMED                   |CLOSED
         Resolution|---                         |FIXED

--- Comment #9 from Sebastian Meyer (<mailto:seb.meyer@fau.de|seb.meyer@fau.de>) ---
So after just under 10 years, this wish has now been addressed in r89316 in the
trunk (to become R 4.6.0 in a few months), thanks also to the discussants here
and at the 'R Dev Day' of RSECon25.

Regarding the formatting as used by summary.data.frame, I only applied minimal
changes as part of this commit to achieve the desired output. The (duplicated)
code of the format and print methods for "summaryDefault" does ask for some
consolidation, which I will address in a separate commit.
